name: github-issue-resolver-agent
description: Find, scope, fix, audit, and publish GitHub issue contributions with an agentic workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Find, fix, audit, and publish GitHub issues.
interface.longDescription: Adds an agentic open-source contribution workflow for finding repositories, triaging issues, reproducing bugs, implementing focused fixes, auditing security risk, and preparing pull requests. Includes companion instructions for GitHub Copilot and Claude.
defaultPrompt: Find and fix a suitable GitHub issue.
Resolve this GitHub bug and prepare a PR.
Audit my fix before publishing the pull request.
